source.title: ZTO Express Full Year 2025 Results and China Express Industry Data

extractions.claim: ZTO Express quarterly parcel volumes in 2025: Q1 8.5B (+19.1%), Q2 9.85B (+16.5%), Q3 ~9.6B (+9.8%), Q4 10.56B (+9.2%)
extractions.evidence: Q1 2025: parcel volume increasing 19.1% to 8.5 billion. Q2: parcel volume was 9,847 million, an increase of 16.5%. Q3: 9.8% growth in parcel volume. Q4: Parcel volume was 10,558 million, increased 9.2% from 9,665 million in the same period of 2024. Full year: 38.5 billion, up 13.3%.

verification.verifier_notes: From ZTO investor relations press releases and earnings call

extractions.claim: ZTO's gross margin declined from 31% to 25% in FY2025, partly due to serving key account customers
extractions.evidence: Parcel volume grew 13.3% for 2025, but gross margin declined from 31.0% to 25.0% and operating margin from 26.6% to 21.3% as other costs nearly doubled, mainly from serving key account customers.

verification.verifier_notes: From ZTO Q4 2025 earnings release; 'key account customers' likely includes PDD

extractions.claim: ZTO guides 10-13% volume growth for 2026 (42.4B-43.5B parcels) vs 8% industry guidance from State Post Bureau
extractions.evidence: The Company expects its parcel volume for 2026 to increase by 10% to 13% year over year, representing a parcel volume range of 42.37 billion to 43.52 billion. CEO referenced the State Post Bureau's estimate of 8% industry growth for 2026.

verification.verifier_notes: From ZTO Q4 2025 earnings call, March 2026

extractions.claim: China total express delivery volume reached ~199B parcels in 2025, up 13.7% YoY; 2026 projected at 214B (+8%)
extractions.evidence: China's parcel delivery sector set a new record in handling nearly 200 billion parcels in 2025, up 13.7 percent year-on-year, according to the State Post Bureau. Revenue from express delivery services reached 1.5 trillion yuan. Official projections for 2026: 214 billion items, +8% YoY.

verification.verifier_notes: State Post Bureau official data via Global Times and Xinhua

extractions.claim: YTO Express delivered ~26.6B parcels in 2024, growing 25.33%, narrowing gap with ZTO
extractions.evidence: YTO Express (600233.SH) delivered around 26.6 billion parcels for the year, growing 25.33%. Morningstar noted that YTO's parcel volume market share gap has narrowed compared with leader ZTO.

verification.verifier_notes: From Morningstar company reports and Bamboo Works analysis

extractions.claim: J&T Express hit 30B parcel volume in 2025 with 22.2% YoY growth
extractions.evidence: J&T Express Hits Record 30 Billion Parcel Volume in 2025 with 22.2% YoY Growth.

verification.verifier_notes: From PR Newswire / Manila Times, January 2026
